pages.home.title: Christophe R Patraldo — Author
pages.home.hero.label: A Space for Writing
pages.home.hero.tagline: A community of writers finding their voice — one daily prompt at a time. Hosted by Christophe R Patraldo.
pages.home.works.label: What We Offer
pages.home.works.heading: A Space for Writers
pages.home.works.description: Tools and community to nurture your creative practice.
pages.home.works.filmscripts.desc: Feature-length and short screenplays spanning drama, sci-fi, and thriller.
pages.home.works.novels.desc: Long-form fiction exploring near futures, alien encounters, and the stories we tell ourselves.
pages.home.works.shortStories.desc: Bite-sized narratives that pack a punch — flash fiction to novelettes.
pages.home.works.comingSoon.desc: New projects in development. Stay tuned for announcements.
pages.home.about.label: About
pages.home.about.heading: About This Space
pages.home.about.paragraph1: This is a creative space for adult writers. Whether you're a seasoned author or finding your voice for the first time, you'll find a daily spark, a quiet place to work, and a community to share your words with.
pages.home.about.paragraph2: Accept the daily prompt or pass for a new one. Write freely or let the community prompt spark something unexpected. Your stats track your journey — streaks, words, growth.

pages.about.title: About — Patrouch
pages.about.heading: About Patrouch
pages.about.paragraph1: A creative writing space where daily prompts spark your imagination. Write in English, Spanish, or French — share your voice with the community or keep it private.
pages.about.paragraph2: Accept the daily spark or pass for a new one. Track your journey with stats, explore the Agora, and see if you can spot the AI among the writers.

pages.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
pages.privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
pages.privacy.sections.responsable.title: 1. Identity and Address of the Data Controller
pages.privacy.sections.dataCollection.in: Patrouch collects the following personal data:
pages.privacy.sections.purposes.title: 3. Purposes of Processing
pages.privacy.sections.purposes.intro: Your personal data will be used for:
pages.privacy.sections.purposes.items.ac: Creating and managing your user account
pages.privacy.sections.purposes.items.re: Publishing your book reviews and comments
pages.privacy.sections.transfers.title: 4. Data Transfers
pages.privacy.sections.transfers.intro: Your data may be transferred to and processed by:
pages.privacy.sections.transfers.cloudfl: Cloudflare, Inc. (United States) - Hosting and security
pages.privacy.sections.transfers.conclus: These transfers are necessary for service provision.
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.title: 5. ARCO Rights
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.intro: As a data subject, you have the right to:
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.access: Access: Know what data we have about you
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.cancel: Cancellation: Request deletion of your data
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.opposi: Opposition: Object to the processing of your data
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.contac: To exercise your ARCO rights, send an email to:
pages.privacy.sections.consent.title: 6. Consent Withdrawal
pages.privacy.sections.consent.text: You can withdraw your consent for data processing at any time by contacting us at:
pages.privacy.sections.cookies.title: 7. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
pages.privacy.sections.cookies.text: We use cookies to keep your session active and improve user experience. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect site functionality.
pages.privacy.sections.security.title: 8. Security Measures
pages.privacy.sections.security.text: We implement administrative, technical, and physical security measures to protect your personal data, including password encryption and secure HTTPS connections.
pages.privacy.sections.changes.title: 9. Changes to Privacy Policy
pages.privacy.sections.changes.text: We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy. Changes will be published on this page and the update date will be modified.
pages.privacy.sections.contact.title: 10. Contact
pages.privacy.sections.contact.text: For any questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at:

pages.terms.title: Terms of Service
pages.terms.heading: Terms of Service
pages.terms.s1_body: By using patrouch.ca, you agree to these terms. If you disagree, please do not use the platform.
pages.terms.s2_intro: patrouch.ca is a creative writing platform that offers:
pages.terms.s2_li1: Daily creative writing prompts (community and personal)
pages.terms.s2_li2: A personal writing space with a text editor
pages.terms.s2_li3: Writing stats (streaks, word counts, growth tracking)
pages.terms.s2_li4: The Agora — a community space to share published writings
pages.terms.s3_body: To write and interact, you must register. You are responsible for:
pages.terms.s4_body: You retain full ownership of everything you write. All content you submit remains your exclusive intellectual property. We do not claim any copyright, ownership, or rights to your work. By setting visibility to "Public," you grant us a limited, non-exclusive, revocable license solely to display your writing on the platform. This license is automatically revoked if you delete the content or change its visibility to private. You may delete or modify your work at any time. You represent and warrant that you own the rights to all content you submit.
pages.terms.s5_li2: Do not post harmful, illegal, or harassing content
pages.terms.s5_li3: Respect others' creative work — do not plagiarize
pages.terms.s5_li4: If you use AI assistance, disclose it honestly
pages.terms.s5_footer: We reserve the right to remove content that violates these guidelines.
pages.terms.s6_body: The platform uses AI for prompt generation only. AI does not write your content unless you explicitly choose to use it. The "AI Assisted" badge is a voluntary self-disclosure.
pages.terms.s7_body: We strive to keep the platform running, but cannot guarantee uninterrupted access. We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features with reasonable notice.
pages.terms.s8_body: The platform is provided "as is." We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the service, including but not limited to loss of unpublished writings.
pages.terms.s9_body: We may update these terms. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. We will update the "Last updated" date.
pages.privacy.s1_body:
patrouch.ca is a creative writing platform hosted by Christophe R Patraldo.
Location: Mexico City
Contact: cheftech@patrouch.ca
pages.privacy.s2_li1: Account info: username, email address, encrypted password
pages.privacy.s2_li2: Writings: content you create (stories, drafts, prompt responses)
pages.privacy.s2_li4: Technical: browser type, hashed IP address (for analytics), session cookies
pages.privacy.s3_li1: To provide and maintain the writing platform
pages.privacy.s3_li2: To display your published writings in the Agora (community space)
pages.privacy.s3_li3: To track your writing stats (streaks, word counts)
pages.privacy.s3_li4: To communicate important updates about the service
pages.privacy.s4_intro: You control the visibility of your writings:
pages.privacy.s4_li3: Public: visible to anyone on the internet
pages.privacy.s4_footer: You can change visibility at any time or delete your writings.
pages.privacy.s5_body: We use Cloudflare Workers AI to generate creative writing prompts. Your writings are not used to train AI models. When you mark a piece as "AI Assisted," this is a voluntary disclosure to readers.
pages.privacy.s6_body: Your data is stored on Cloudflare's infrastructure (D1 database). Data is encrypted in transit. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.
pages.privacy.s7_li1: Session cookie: keeps you logged in (HttpOnly, 30 days)
pages.privacy.s8_body: You may request to view, modify, or delete your personal data at any time by contacting cheftech@patrouch.ca.
pages.privacy.s9_body: We may update this policy. Changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.
write.dashboard.completed_msg: Well done. Come back tomorrow for a new prompt.
badges.title: 🏅 Badge Collection
badges.badge_009_description: Shared your first writing in the Agora
badges.badge_011_description: Achieved 90%+ accuracy in an Agora game
badges.badge_016_description: Featured as Writer of the Week
badges.locked_hint: Keep writing to unlock this badge!
onboarding.step0_body: A creative writing space where daily prompts spark your imagination. Write in English, Spanish, or French.
onboarding.step1_body: Every day you'll get a fresh writing prompt. Accept it and write, or pass up to 3 times for a new one. Each pass is a chance to find the perfect spark.
onboarding.step2_body: Share your writings with the community. Discover what others have written. And play "Spot the AI" — can you tell which writings are AI-generated?
onboarding.step3_body: Your writing streaks, word counts, and milestones are all tracked. Earn badges as you grow. Every word counts!
onboarding.step4_body: Your first prompt is waiting. Accept it and start writing — or explore the Agora to see what the community is creating.
badges.share_cta: Join me at patrouch.ca — write every day, unlock badges, and spot the AI. And more!
profile.delete_confirm: Delete "{name}"? This will also delete their writings, profiles, and data.
profile.stats_empty: Write something to see your stats here!
profile.privacy_hint: When enabled, your username links to your public writer profile from your writings.
newsletter.confirmed_success: You're subscribed! Every Sunday at 9 AM CST, your Weekly Spark arrives in your inbox.
newsletter.confirmed_already: You're already subscribed. Your Weekly Spark arrives every Sunday at 9 AM CST.
pages.home.explore.label: Explore
pages.home.explore.heading: Discover More
signup.adult_confirm: I confirm I am 18 years of age or older.
signup.age_required: You must be 18 or older to use this platform.
signup.success: Account created! Check your email to verify your address.
evaluate.title: AI Writing Evaluation
evaluate.description: Paste your writing and get honest, constructive feedback from AI. Raw drafts welcome — this tool values originality and risk-taking over polish.
evaluate.privacy_note: Your text is evaluated privately on our servers. It is never shared, stored, or used for training.
evaluate.history_empty: No evaluations yet. Submit your first text above.
audio.title: Text to Audio
audio.description: Convert your writing to spoken audio. Optionally use AI to develop your raw text into a polished story first.
audio.placeholder: Paste your writing here... (up to 5000 characters)
audio.ai_develop: Develop with AI first (refine into a story)
audio.privacy: Your text is processed privately. Audio is generated in real-time and not stored.
audio.key_desc: To use this feature, you need your own ElevenLabs API key. It is stored securely in your account and never shared.
help.title: How Patrouch.ca Works
help.write_desc: Get a daily creative spark. Write in any language — open writing or inspired by visual art from Antoine Patraldo. Save drafts, publish to the Agora, track your streaks.
help.evaluate_desc: Get AI-powered writing feedback. Craft analysis focused on voice, originality, and emotional impact — not grammar. Private and stays on Cloudflare infrastructure.
help.audio_desc: Convert your writing to speech. Free via Cloudflare melotts, or use ElevenLabs / Kokoro for higher quality. You provide your own API key.
help.findai_desc: Read writings in the Agora and guess which ones were written by humans and which by AI. Test your instincts!
help.agora_desc: The public gallery. Browse writings from the community, filter by human/AI, and discover new voices.
help.profile_desc: Manage your pen names, view stats, badges, writing heatmap, and milestones.
